languages.text: {n}На морщинистых щеках Камиллы проступает румянец, пробиваясь даже сквозь щедрый слой пудры.{/n} "Ох, что вы, любезн{mf|ый|ая}! Не знаю, кто заморочил вам голову, но эта должность — в юных, но весьма умелых руках госпожи Ювенны. Разумеется, когда придет ее время встать во главе династии, то понадобится верный соратник на это место. Сейчас же Даргонус не мог бы желать лучшего пастыря".

traits.locale_text: {n}На морщинистых щеках Камиллы проступает румянец, пробиваясь даже сквозь щедрый слой пудры.{/n} "Ох, что вы, любезн{mf|ый|ая}! Не знаю, кто заморочил вам голову, но эта должность — в юных, но весьма умелых руках госпожи Ювенны. Разумеется, когда придет ее время встать во главе династии, то понадобится верный соратник на это место. Сейчас же Даргонус не мог бы желать лучшего пастыря".

languages.text: {n}Camilla's wrinkled cheeks flush pink, visible even through the generous layer of powder.{/n} "Oh, come now, my {mf|lord|lady}! I do not know who has led you astray, but that duty lies in the young but most capable hands of Lady Juvenna von Valancius. Of course, when her time comes to take the helm of the dynasty, a loyal ally will be needed to fill the position here. But for now, Dargonus could not wish for a better steward."

I do not know who has led you astray, but that duty lies in the young but most capable hands of Lady Juvenna von Valancius. languages.text: {n}卡米拉布满皱纹的双颊泛起红晕，即便是那层厚厚的脂粉也遮掩不住。{/n}“哦，别这样，亲爱的！我不知道是谁误导了你，但目前这个职责，正由年轻却极为能干的尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯女士负责。当然，等她日后执掌王朝之时，自然会需要一位忠诚的盟友来填补此位。但就现在而言，达戈努斯找不出比她更好的管理者了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Camilla's wrinkled cheeks flush pink, visible even through the generous layer of powder.{/n} "Oh, come now, my {mf|lord|lady}! I do not know who has led you astray, but that duty lies in the young but most capable hands of Lady Juvenna von Valancius. Of course, when her time comes to take the helm of the dynasty, a loyal ally will be needed to fill the position here. But for now, Dargonus could not wish for a better steward."

traits.locale_text: {n}卡米拉布满皱纹的双颊泛起红晕，即便是那层厚厚的脂粉也遮掩不住。{/n}“哦，别这样，亲爱的！我不知道是谁误导了你，但目前这个职责，正由年轻却极为能干的尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯女士负责。当然，等她日后执掌王朝之时，自然会需要一位忠诚的盟友来填补此位。但就现在而言，达戈努斯找不出比她更好的管理者了。”

languages.text: {n}Vous voyez le rouge monter aux joues ridées de Camilla, même à travers sa généreuse couche de poudre.{/n} « Allons donc, {mf|mon bon seigneur|ma bonne dame} ! J'ignore qui vous a {mf|induit|induite} en erreur, mais cette responsabilité est entre les mains très capables, si jeunes soient-elles, de dame Juvenna von Valancius. Bien sûr, quand le moment viendra pour elle de prendre les rênes de la dynastie, un allié loyal sera nécessaire pour la remplacer dans ce rôle. Mais en attendant, Dargonus ne pourrait pas rêver d'une meilleure dirigeante. »
languages.original_text: {n}Camilla's wrinkled cheeks flush pink, visible even through the generous layer of powder.{/n} "Oh, come now, my {mf|lord|lady}! I do not know who has led you astray, but that duty lies in the young but most capable hands of Lady Juvenna von Valancius. Of course, when her time comes to take the helm of the dynasty, a loyal ally will be needed to fill the position here. But for now, Dargonus could not wish for a better steward."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous voyez le rouge monter aux joues ridées de Camilla, même à travers sa généreuse couche de poudre.{/n} « Allons donc, {mf|mon bon seigneur|ma bonne dame} ! J'ignore qui vous a {mf|induit|induite} en erreur, mais cette responsabilité est entre les mains très capables, si jeunes soient-elles, de dame Juvenna von Valancius. Bien sûr, quand le moment viendra pour elle de prendre les rênes de la dynastie, un allié loyal sera nécessaire pour la remplacer dans ce rôle. Mais en attendant, Dargonus ne pourrait pas rêver d'une meilleure dirigeante. »

languages.text: {n}Camilla'nın kırışık yanakları, cömert pudra tabakasından bile görülebilecek şekilde pembeleşiyor.{/n} "Yapmayın {mf|lordum|leydim}! Sizi kim yanılttı bilmiyorum ama o vazife, genç ve son derece yetenekli Leydi Juvenna von Valancius'un. Elbette hanedanlığın dümenine geçme zamanı geldiğinde buradaki boşluğu doldurmak için sadık bir müttefike ihtiyaç duyulacaktır. Ancak şimdilik Dargonus, daha iyi bir idareci dileyemezdi."
languages.original_text: {n}Camilla's wrinkled cheeks flush pink, visible even through the generous layer of powder.{/n} "Oh, come now, my {mf|lord|lady}! I do not know who has led you astray, but that duty lies in the young but most capable hands of Lady Juvenna von Valancius. Of course, when her time comes to take the helm of the dynasty, a loyal ally will be needed to fill the position here. But for now, Dargonus could not wish for a better steward."

traits.locale_text: {n}Camilla'nın kırışık yanakları, cömert pudra tabakasından bile görülebilecek şekilde pembeleşiyor.{/n} "Yapmayın {mf|lordum|leydim}! Sizi kim yanılttı bilmiyorum ama o vazife, genç ve son derece yetenekli Leydi Juvenna von Valancius'un. Elbette hanedanlığın dümenine geçme zamanı geldiğinde buradaki boşluğu doldurmak için sadık bir müttefike ihtiyaç duyulacaktır. Ancak şimdilik Dargonus, daha iyi bir idareci dileyemezdi."

languages.text: {n}El rubor se asoma entre las arrugas de Camilla, haciéndose ver a través del abundante maquillaje.{/n} «¡Vamos, mi{mf|lord|lady}! No sé quién le ha engañado, pero el deber está en las jóvenes pero capaces manos de lady Juvenna von Valancius. Por supuesto, cuando llegue el momento de que asuma el mando de la dinastía, necesitará una aliada fiel para ocupar el cargo aquí, pero por el momento Dargonus no podía pedir una administradora mejor».
languages.original_text: {n}Camilla's wrinkled cheeks flush pink, visible even through the generous layer of powder.{/n} "Oh, come now, my {mf|lord|lady}! I do not know who has led you astray, but that duty lies in the young but most capable hands of Lady Juvenna von Valancius. Of course, when her time comes to take the helm of the dynasty, a loyal ally will be needed to fill the position here. But for now, Dargonus could not wish for a better steward."

traits.locale_text: {n}El rubor se asoma entre las arrugas de Camilla, haciéndose ver a través del abundante maquillaje.{/n} «¡Vamos, mi{mf|lord|lady}! No sé quién le ha engañado, pero el deber está en las jóvenes pero capaces manos de lady Juvenna von Valancius. Por supuesto, cuando llegue el momento de que asuma el mando de la dinastía, necesitará una aliada fiel para ocupar el cargo aquí, pero por el momento Dargonus no podía pedir una administradora mejor».

languages.text: {n}Camillas faltige Wangen erröten, was selbst durch die großzügige Lage Puder zu sehen ist.{/n} "Oh, kommt schon {mf|Mylord|Mylady}! Ich weiß nicht, wer Euch in die Irre geführt hat, aber diese Pflicht ruht in den Händen der jungen, aber ausgesprochen kompetenten Lady Juvenna von Valancius. Wenn ihre Zeit gekommen ist, das Ruder der Dynastie zu übernehmen, wird natürlich ein loyaler Verbündeter ihre jetzige Position einnehmen müssen. Aber bis dahin könnte sich Dargonus keine bessere Verwalterin wünschen."
languages.original_text: {n}Camilla's wrinkled cheeks flush pink, visible even through the generous layer of powder.{/n} "Oh, come now, my {mf|lord|lady}! I do not know who has led you astray, but that duty lies in the young but most capable hands of Lady Juvenna von Valancius. Of course, when her time comes to take the helm of the dynasty, a loyal ally will be needed to fill the position here. But for now, Dargonus could not wish for a better steward."

Ich weiß nicht, wer Euch in die Irre geführt hat, aber diese Pflicht ruht in den Händen der jungen, aber ausgesprochen kompetenten Lady Juvenna von Valancius. Wenn ihre Zeit gekommen ist, das Ruder der Dynastie zu übernehmen, wird natürlich ein loyaler Verbündeter ihre jetzige Position einnehmen müssen. Aber bis dahin könnte sich Dargonus keine bessere Verwalterin wünschen."

languages.text: {n}カミラは頬を赤らめ、粉で隠れたその様子が伺える。{/n} 「ああ、そんなことないわよ、私の{mf|旦那様|奥様}！誰に導かれたのかはわからないけれど、その責任は、若くても能力のあるジュベナ・フォン・ヴァランシウス嬢の手に委ねられているわ。もちろん、彼女が家督を継ぐ時、忠実な同盟者が必要になるだろう。でも今は、ダゴナスはもっと良い管理人など望めないわ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Camilla's wrinkled cheeks flush pink, visible even through the generous layer of powder.{/n} "Oh, come now, my {mf|lord|lady}! I do not know who has led you astray, but that duty lies in the young but most capable hands of Lady Juvenna von Valancius. Of course, when her time comes to take the helm of the dynasty, a loyal ally will be needed to fill the position here. But for now, Dargonus could not wish for a better steward."

traits.locale_text: {n}カミラは頬を赤らめ、粉で隠れたその様子が伺える。{/n} 「ああ、そんなことないわよ、私の{mf|旦那様|奥様}！誰に導かれたのかはわからないけれど、その責任は、若くても能力のあるジュベナ・フォン・ヴァランシウス嬢の手に委ねられているわ。もちろん、彼女が家督を継ぐ時、忠実な同盟者が必要になるだろう。でも今は、ダゴナスはもっと良い管理人など望めないわ。」
